name: BB:UBA : Workstation Locked
notes: Building block to track workstation locked events.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Workstation Locked on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event QID is one of the following (5000964) Success Audit: The workstation was locked
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Workstation Locked on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000964) Success Audit: The workstation was locked
